textByHash.052006d8f1a6e3479bbb8cd0fb9cb23c0b5a5adf: Of course! Let's rid Morytania of evil, once and for all!
textByHash.0736649604dbdc89c9d407c38dc02d533b2abd7d: Okay. Thanks for letting me know. I'll tell Polmafi.
textByHash.0d95aa2655746f37b8313590484f2675e5df8d0c: For me personally, I hope that more people will join our ranks soon. Strengh comes in numbers after all.
textByHash.116ac84c77f375a68ef0962980545912018abcfc: But... once the deed is done, we don't have any further need of her. We kill her as well and Morytania is finally free of that wretched family.
textByHash.387bd380c5d04e365c25b490bc05c01033b4835e: I help with anything I can. I used to be a mercenary before joining the Myreque so I know my way around a blade. I've relied on Veliaf's sword arm many a time. I like to think that he can rely on mine.
textByHash.38bdfa58b20a303083b9ccf13fa5e2bacee120b9: Has he now? A good decision if you ask me.
textByHash.393fcaaa5ba82152a0d771bd8f8b78b46bd4b2aa: How do we know you won't just kill us once this is done?
textByHash.3c34d8f0e45807fa323ef80d422e7c322a9f575d: Let us hope, let us hope.
textByHash.420a449fba3e93005ae21157276522f172983bec: Don't worry, I'm just getting my stuff together before leaving. Good luck with your trip to the temple.
textByHash.611d8e4a1d971b4786fcacb11fc68de5c9aa82f4: Greetings! Good to see some new blood. You'd better speak with Veliaf. He's in charge here.
textByHash.62336cc1cea4cf0b0501a31d3e19b79cef6f12da: Hello again! How can I be of service to you?
textByHash.661653c029690717903679ed758bc90ef91148a3: I have. Something you might find interesting is that Safalaan Hallow, the leader of another Myreque group, has apparently managed to sneak one of his people into the vampyre capital, Darkmeyer.
textByHash.697000ceb83b7839600986ecadef4191a6ce8e06: We're the only resistance against the vampyres. We're seriously outnumbered though. Veliaf doesn't like to hear us saying 'hopeless' but that's our situation at the minute.
textByHash.6d162dd290f25a9168da0f263a358893b031b331: You should let them know my plan. I bet that will convince some of them.
textByHash.78121a6b4d3975248b1d30e286963536023d122a: Oh yes. Here's how I see it. Vanescula is right, we can't kill her brother without her help.
textByHash.795a894f14beb6c7ef89d3f0b0ef77376d94926c: I hope you came well armed my friend. These are dangerous times.
textByHash.83691065bd6e77b9eb068f4ce0ff3390c1cbe2ff: Ah, I see you've introduced yourself to Veliaf. Are you planning to join the fray against the Drakans?
textByHash.8ba8d2d3e08a825444a33fcda1275870958fe2ad: That monster! He killed them! We'll make them all pay!
textByHash.8e98f80b7c0633b64e904ccb131b965642f591c8: Well of course she said that. She needs us to believe that we need her, otherwise her whole plan is done for.
textByHash.a582fd57f677d6586035f5dadcc7bcdf1d9b71eb: I'm not sure how true that is. It would be great though!
textByHash.a931ae72694f043bd3be6fbf17aac0ebfa4eea1f: True. It looks like Veliaf and Safalaan are waiting for you. We will talk more later.
textByHash.c54e0150e62ccea88276719c70261a3c6556861a: Imagine, the death of Lowerniel Drakan. Think what that could do to these dark lands.
textByHash.d2f2fbe9cd83af85b707aaeb2f52223b23a7e491: Think about it. Lowerniel Drakan is supposedly the most powerful vampyre in existence. What vampyre would dare cross the humans that killed him?
textByHash.d44cc1a73e20acb420bc40c8310795722a602082: Best we don't talk right now. You need to be watching Safalaan and Vanescula and I don't want to distract you.
textByHash.df2c86eccdb2706c59695dcf47631508bf82c776: Thanks for doing such good work on the new hideout. Of course, we've tidied up a bit as you can see.
textByHash.e3b5874a7f57ae17672fae5d4d4f34e67c0664be: Sure, go ahead. I'll answer as best I can.
textByHash.f19178f45d7e0baacd9549a637d21f5074c169e0: We've come a long way. Just one final hurdle.
textByHash.f2d1e63ab9536483e660eb83e142c42be462b783: Hello. I hear you're doing some important work for Veliaf. You'd best get to it.
textByHash.fa6b060c095ad93c68d20c68235e2c34ab2051c9: That's more a question for Veliaf. Ultimately though, our goal is to rid Morytania of the vampyres so that we might reclaim our right to exist.
